title: E2E, screenshots and documentation handoff
goal: Verify the full user scenario and update operational documentation.
requirements: Add or update e2e for board -> open card -> ask sidebar AI about current card.
Add e2e assertion that the request carries window_id/context_version and the runtime path can call ui.get_current_context.
Add e2e assertion for race safety: submit on card A, open card B, first response still uses card A snapshot.
Add e2e or unit coverage that sidebar compaction reads surfaces.sidebar.recent_message_limit from ai.chat_settings and defaults to 8.
Add unit coverage that full_page and sidebar resolve effective settings from the shared contract.
Add unit coverage for client capabilities being ignored as permissions.
Add unit coverage for expired snapshot cleanup.
Capture desktop and mobile screenshots under .local/ or the standard e2e artifact path.
Write executor report and acceptance report.
Run make gen-struct after structure changes.
acceptance: E2E proves the selected card context is available through ui.get_current_context.
E2E proves message-bound context does not change when UI selection changes after submit.
Screenshots show the 'Все функции' menu, sidebar chat and collapsed/pinned sidebar states.
Docs state that sidebar has no session switcher and no summary regeneration UI in the MVP.
Docs state that full_page and sidebar chat settings are resolved from the shared ai.chat_settings contract.
Docs explain how modules should expose data-ai-context.
